title: Bilingual Nursery in Zollikon | Tandem IMS
text: Tandem IMS – Campus Zollikon Zurich Küsnacht Erlenbach A Warm Start to Bilingual Learning Located near Lake Zurich in beautiful Zollikon, the Tandem IMS Campus Zollikon offers a nurturing start for young children. Our bilingual nursery provides a safe, caring, and stimulating environment where children learn naturally through play, discovery, and interaction. Here, English and German are part of everyday life. Children absorb both languages effortlessly while developing social and emotional confidence under the guidance of experienced educators. Our Nursery in Zollikon WELCOME TO TANDEM INTERNATIONAL MULTILINGUAL SCHOOL Each of our schools offer full day educational programmes and care. KüsnachtGymnasium & 5-6th grade learn more ZurichEarly Years to Primary learn more ZollikonEarly Years & Pre-School learn more ErlenbachEarly Years & Pre-School learn more Our Spaces Tandem IMS is a dynamic day school, offering high-quality multilingual education (German, English and French) in a warm and child-friendly environment where both local Swiss and international families are welcome. Our unique multilingual concept accompanies children from early childhood all the way to the Swiss Matura. All pupils engage in translanguaging, seamlessly incorporating German, English and French into their learning experience, supported by two native language teachers working together in the same classroom. In addition, our enquiry-based learning curriculum, based on the Primary Years Programme of the International Baccalaureate (IB) ensures a stimulating, creative and thought-provoking multidimensional education. Why Families Choose Tandem IMS Zollikon Bilingual nursery in English and German Warm, family-oriented environment Qualified, caring educators with international experience Beautiful location close to Zurich’s lake and city Smooth transition to other Tandem IMS campuses (Erlenbach, Zürich) Discover our Zollikon Campus Visit The Tandem IMS Campus Zollikon We invite you to visit our Campus in Zollikon and discover how bilingual early education builds confidence and curiosity from the very beginning. Contact us to arrange a personal visit or learn more about our admissions process. 📍 Campus Zollikon Alte Landstrasse 88 8702 Zollikon 📧 zollikon@tandem-ims.ch 📞 +41 43 500 10 20 Our Other Campuses Tandem IMS operates several campuses across the Canton of Zurich, each sharing the same bilingual philosophy: Campus Zürich – Nursery, Kindergarten, Primary Campus Erlenbach – Nursery & Kindergarten Campus Küsnacht – Primary School & Gymnasium FAQs Where is the Zollikon campus located? Our campus sits at Alte Landstrasse 88, a quiet residential area above Lake Zurich, safe, green, and close to the city. What programmes are offered in Zollikon? Zollikon is home to our bilingual nursery, providing early learning through play in English and German. How do children benefit from the location? The peaceful, lakeside setting gives children plenty of opportunities for outdoor play, walks, and nature discovery. How is the campus connected to other Tandem IMS sites? Families benefit from the Tandem School Bus, which connects Zollikon with Zürich, Erlenbach, and Küsnacht for smooth daily transfers. Is there parking or public transport nearby? Yes. The campus is easily accessible by bus and train, and a convenient drop-off area is available for parents. Parent Reviews Our daughter Milla started in Kindergarten 1 and finished in grade 6. We are so thankful to all the teachers, management and administration for the great work they do with the children. Tandem IMS offers a friendly environment and the warmth of a family. Milla had a lot of fun but she also learned a lot. She is not only academically strong in English and German and advanced in French but she developed as an individual who loves and respects people, who is independent and confident, who is free to express her opinion, who knows how to organize her daily life and work under pressure. As she said in her graduation speech: «Here in Tandem I had the best time of my life! I am looking forward to the future because I know I am well prepared for the next step of my life.» Our son Philip attended Tandem from Primary 1 through 6. What convinced us of this school were the multilingual education, the enquiry-based learning approach, and the excellent after-school care programme. The teachers we met over the years were all highly qualified and very motivated. The community spirit at the school is exceptional: fifth graders play with first graders, mixed age groups at Sports Day, and loyal alumni to the school. Philip also attended the preparation course for the Gymi exam offered at Tandem. The level of detailed preparation by his teacher was outstanding. It was integrated seamlessly into the school routine. The learning journey at Tandem gave Philip a head start for his secondary education. I can highly recommend Tandem to all families looking for a multilingual primary education. Our experience at Tandem Erlenbach has been wonderful and totally recommendable. Sara has been happy at Tandem IMS Erlenbach each and every day of the almost three years she has spent there. Tandem's educational method allows each child to progress in an individual and personalised way, but at the same time creates strong bonds with the rest of the children in each group. The diverse atmosphere and the values of Tandem IMS (tolerance, team spirit, kindness, respect…) are something that all schools should promote and that we truly appreciated. Neven started in Kiga 1 and stayed until the end of Primary 6, a total of 8 years. He is a very active and lively boy. All the different teachers he had at Tandem IMS were able to motivate and interest him through all these years. They recognised his strengths and supported him when needed. Neven successfully passed the Gymiprüfung and also in Gymnasium it shows how well he is prepared for learning in a demanding environment. As we’re both working parents we alway
